'''Riit Jandi''' was an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] who seized control of [[Elshandruu Pica]] shortly after the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]]. His wife, [[Aellyn Jandi|Aellyn]], some forty years younger than Riit, conducted a secret affair with [[Sair Yonka]].

{{Char-stub}}
